channel.title: Capitalist ME: Global News, Business, Politics, Finance and Sports
channel.description: Capitalist ME offers global news, in-depth coverage on business, politics, finance, culture, sports, and the latest world events. Stay informed on key issues

image.title: Capitalist ME: Global News, Business, Politics, Finance and Sports

item.title: England vs Costa Rica: Gordon, Rice Lead 3-0 Victory
item.description:
England beat Costa Rica 3-0 in their final World Cup warm-up as Anthony Gordon starred, while Declan Rice and Ollie Watkins scored.

Key points:
• Declan Rice opened the scoring in the 9th minute after being set up by Anthony Gordon.
• Gordon scored England's second goal from the penalty spot in the 68th minute.
• Ollie Watkins added a late third goal to seal the 3-0 victory.
• The match was England's final World Cup warm-up before their opener against Croatia.

Read the full article: England vs Costa Rica: Gordon, Rice Lead 3-0 Victory
